title: dichanthium saccharoides subvar. torreyanum
intro: Dichanthium saccharoides subvar. torreyanum, commonly known as blue grama grass, is a type of grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of blue grama grass include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of blue grama grass include making infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
